mapper.select: SELECT corp_id AS corpId, corp_code AS corpCode, corp_name AS corpName, password, manager, phone, email, create_date AS createDate FROM corp WHERE corp_code = #{corpCode}
SELECT corp_id AS corpId, corp_code AS corpCode, corp_name AS corpName, password, manager, phone, email, create_date AS createDate FROM corp WHERE corp_id = #{corpId}
